# Portal.view.Viewport: transitioning between main content views sometimes loses the flex value

![Screenshot 2024-07-28 at 17 22 44](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/91c1c3dc-896e-4165-bb42-8c9e877b4613)

While it would be worth to spend more time into it, why switching back & forth only sometimes loses the flex value, we do need a quick-fix now.

The ticket might be resolved generically via: https://github.com/orgs/neomjs/discussions/5408
